title: Do Aliens Know We’re Here?
description:
If aliens looked at Earth from far away, would they know we’re here?

Imagine little aliens speeding toward us – but their tech is the same level as ours. Astronomers just wrote a paper about what they’d see!

For optimistic science and tech stories, subscribe!

DOI 10.3847/1538-3881/ada3c7

#shorts #aliens #space #astronomy #science #animation
